params.prompt: Wide interior shot with a slow and smooth dolly in. Dramatic shadows crawl and shift across walls, furnishings, and architectural surfaces. Crisp shadow edges in motion. Editorial film style. Neutral white balance, balanced exposure, stable motion. Atmospheric architectural cinematography. Very slow dolly out, camera moves from interior toward the glass doors and patio, daylight flows outward revealing the tea nook, shadows lengthen gradually, consistent exposure, cinematic, photorealistic Relax (patio/sunroom), Calm, textured minimalism — warm daylight, tactile materials, quiet family presence. Maintain believable residential scale for Relax (patio/sunroom) at roughly medium. Plausible light drift from visible sources only, consistent exposure, straight architecture, stable walls and windows, premium real-estate cinematography.
